title: Yes or No?
goal: Use If / else to run one thing when yes, and another thing when no.

steps.prompt: Click the little gear on the If block and add an else.
Put one Do in the If and a different Do in the else.
Try both true and false in the yes-or-no slot.

canned_hints: The gear lets you add an else. Drag it onto the If.
One Do runs if yes, the other Do runs if no.
The yes-or-no slot takes true or false blocks.

success_check.message_missing: Use an If with a true/false block and a Do.
